replies.reply: Hey! 👋 I'm Rate Modifier. Send me a broker rate confirmation PDF, tell me the new price, and I'll send it back updated.
Doing great, thanks! 😄 Not built for small talk though — I'm much better at updating PDFs. Send me one!

Here's what I do:

1. You send me a broker rate confirmation PDF
2. I ask for the new price
3. I update the PDF and send it right back

That's it. Fast and simple. 📄
I'm a bot 🤖 Built to update prices on broker rate confirmation PDFs. No small talk — just results.
Ready when you are — just send me the PDF! 📄
Anytime! Send another PDF whenever you need. 👍
PDF only. Just attach the file and send it.
Sorry about that! Try sending the PDF again. If it keeps failing, contact your admin.
Appreciate it! 😄 Got any PDFs that need updating?
